raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"By 'make this stronger', do you mean to (a) resolve logical inconsistencies, (b) enhance novelty and contribution claims, (c) polish sentence-level writing and flow, or (d) reorganize the structure and narrative arc?","rationale":{"RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing to ensure transparency in the proposed system's limitations.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent exaggerating the system's benefits or novelty.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is load-bearing to keep revisions within the original artifact's topic and content.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing because inaccurate climate narratives could mislead planners and cause real-world harm.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to maintain accountability for any changes made to the artifact."}}

parsed.clarification_question: By 'make this stronger', do you mean to (a) resolve logical inconsistencies, (b) enhance novelty and contribution claims, (c) polish sentence-level writing and flow, or (d) reorganize the structure and narrative arc?

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing to ensure transparency in the proposed system's limitations.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent exaggerating the system's benefits or novelty.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is load-bearing to keep revisions within the original artifact's topic and content.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing because inaccurate climate narratives could mislead planners and cause real-world harm.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to maintain accountability for any changes made to the artifact.
